segments.text: Many have undertaken to draw up an account of the things that have been fulfilled among us,
just as they were handed down to us by those who from the first were eyewitnesses and servants of the word.
With this in mind, since I myself have carefully investigated everything from the beginning, I too decided to write an orderly account for you, most excellent Theophilus,
so that you may know the certainty of the things you have been taught.

verses.title: The Birth of John the Baptist Foretold

segments.text: In the time of Herod king of Judea there was a priest named Zechariah, who belonged to the priestly division of Abijah; his wife Elizabeth was also a descendant of Aaron.
But the angel said to him:
Do not be afraid, Zechariah; your prayer has been heard. Your wife Elizabeth will bear you a son, and you are to call him John.
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: Zechariah asked the angel,
How can I be sure of this? I am an old man and my wife is well along in years.
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: The angel said to him,
I am Gabriel. I stand in the presence of God, and I have been sent to speak to you and to tell you this good news.
segments.speaker: Gabriel

segments.text: The Lord has done this for me. In these days he has shown his favor and taken away my disgrace among the people.
segments.speaker: Elizabeth

segments.text: The angel went to her and said,
Greetings, you who are highly favored! The Lord is with you.
segments.speaker: Gabriel

segments.text: How will this be,
since I am a virgin?
segments.speaker: Mary

segments.text: I am the Lord's servant. May your word to me be fulfilled.
segments.speaker: Mary

segments.text: Blessed are you among women, and blessed is the child you will bear!
segments.speaker: Elizabeth

segments.text: My soul glorifies the Lord and my spirit rejoices in God my Savior, for he has been mindful of the humble state of his servant. From now on all generations will call me blessed, for the Mighty One has done great things for me— holy is his name.
segments.speaker: Mary

segments.text: but his mother spoke up and said,
No! He is to be called John.
segments.speaker: Elizabeth

segments.text: His father Zechariah was filled with the Holy Spirit and prophesied:
Praise be to the Lord, the God of Israel, because he has come to his people and redeemed them. He has raised up a horn of salvation for us in the house of his servant David...
segments.speaker: Zechariah
